name: Tuna Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 1-inch-long pieces
3/4 pound rotini or other corkscrew pasta
2 cans solid white tuna, packed in water (6-1/8 ounce)
1/2 cup chopped pitted black olives, preferably brine-cured
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the beans to a colander.
2. Add pasta to the same pot of water and cook until tender but still firm to bite. Pour the pasta into the same colander and rinse under cold water to cool. Drain well.
3. Place tuna in a large bowl; break into small pieces. Add green onions, tomato, black olives, pasta, and green beans.
4. Mix mayonnaise, balsamic vinegar, and celery salt in a small bowl. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
5. Mix the dressing into the pasta salad and serve.
